homeScreenView.disclaimer: This is an unofficial deduction game which is not affiliated with any commercial title.

rulesView.camouflageDescription: Camouflage is a deduction game where your objective depends on your hidden role.
rulesView.authenticObjective: You know the authentic word. Identify and eliminate the Masks and the Chameleon.
rulesView.maskObjective: You know a different word. Blend in and avoid detection.
rulesView.chameleonObjective: You receive no word. Deduce the authentic word and blend in.

gameplay.title: Gameplay
gameplay.paragraph1: Each round, every player must say <bold>one word</bold> related to the word they were given.
gameplay.paragraph2: Your word must be different from the given word and cannot share the same root (for example, you cannot say "icy" if your word is "ice").
gameplay.paragraph3: If you are the Chameleon and have no word, say a word that fits in with what others are saying to avoid suspicion.
gameplay.paragraph4: The goal is to <bold>identify and eliminate players</bold> whose roles are different from your own.

voting.title: Voting phase
voting.paragraph1: After all players have spoken, the game enters the voting phase. Players discuss and vote to eliminate one player by a show of hands.
voting.paragraph2: Players may <bold>not</bold> say their word during the voting discussion.
voting.paragraph3: In the event of a tie, the tied players each reveal one additional word, then everyone votes again.
voting.paragraph4: Alternatively, the player who started the round may cast a vote that counts as double to break the tie.
voting.paragraph5: Eliminated players cannot interfere with the game in any way.

chameleonGuess.title: Chameleon Guess
chameleonGuess.paragraph1: If the Chameleon is eliminated and this option is enabled, they are given one final chance to guess the authentic word.
chameleonGuess.paragraph2: If the guess is <bold>successful</bold>, the game immediately ends and the Chameleon wins.
chameleonGuess.paragraph3: If the guess is incorrect, the Chameleon is fully eliminated and the game continues.

rounds.title: Rounds
rounds.paragraph1: After voting, a new round begins. Each remaining player says another word, followed by another vote. This continues until a win condition is met.

winConditions.title: Win Conditions
winConditions.condition1: <bold>Only Authentics remain alive:</bold> All Authentics win.
winConditions.condition2: <bold>One Authentic alive, no Masks alive, Chameleon alive:</bold> The Chameleon wins.
winConditions.condition3: <bold>One Authentic alive, Chameleon eliminated, at least one Mask alive: </bold> All Masks win.
winConditions.condition4: <bold>No Authentics alive, Chameleon alive, at least one Mask alive: </bold> The Chameleon and all Masks win.

wordRevealView.nameTooLong: Name must be {{max}} characters or less

discussionView.discussionInstructions1: Each player must say <bold>one word</bold>, starting from <bold>{{startingPlayerName}}</bold> and continuing clockwise, until everyone has said a word.
discussionView.discussionInstructions2: Once everyone is done, discuss who you think are the <bold>Masks</bold> or the <bold>Chameleon</bold>, then proceed to the voting phase.

forgotWordView.areYouSureYouWantToLookAtTheWordFor: Are you sure want to look at the word for <bold>{{playerName}}</bold>?
